---
title: Beaubourg, Paris
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557452/beaubourg_20211024_q4mzih.png
description: Beaubourg, Paris
categories: [urbansketch]
date: 2021/10/24
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557452/beaubourg_20211024_q4mzih.png)

:::
